reviews.comment:
Algo incomodo el acceso. Por suerte hay quien se ocupa de ordenar el ingreso para cargar combustible.
La atención es rápida por parte del personal, pero los que se demoran son los conductores a la hora del pago.

(Translated by Google)
Access is a bit awkward. Luckily, there's someone managing the flow of people entering to refuel. The staff is quick, but the drivers are slow when it comes to paying.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLMXNUcWV3EAE
